agent.name: Employee Salary Query Agent
agent.description: An AI agent that connects to the employee database and answers salary-related questions

tools.name: query_employee_salary
tools.description: Query the database to find an employee's salary information

function.sql_template: SELECT name, position, salary, department FROM employees WHERE LOWER(name) = LOWER(?)

examples.input: How much salary does Rutuj have?
examples.output: Rutuj's salary is ₹450,000 per annum as a Software Engineer in the IT Department

tools.name: query_department_salaries
tools.description: Get average salary information for a specific department

function.sql_template: SELECT department, AVG(salary) as average_salary, COUNT(*) as employee_count FROM employees WHERE LOWER(department) = LOWER(?) GROUP BY department

tools.name: query_salary_range
tools.description: Find employees within a specific salary range

function.sql_template: SELECT name, position, salary FROM employees WHERE salary BETWEEN ? AND ? ORDER BY salary DESC
SELECT name, position, salary, department FROM employees ORDER BY salary DESC LIMIT ?

templates.single_employee_salary: {name}'s salary is ₹{salary} per annum as a {position} in the {department} department
templates.not_found: I couldn't find salary information for {name} in the database
templates.department_average: The average salary in the {department} department is ₹{average_salary} with {employee_count} employees
templates.error: I encountered an error while querying the database. Please try again later.

error_handling.database_connection_failed: Unable to connect to the database. Please try again later.
error_handling.query_timeout: The query took too long to execute. Please try with more specific criteria.
error_handling.invalid_input: Please provide a valid employee name or criteria.
error_handling.no_results: No employees found matching your criteria.
